# Spec Bridge

This directory is a **synced mirror** of the canonical spec artifacts from
the AppArchitect-Foundation workspace. The Foundation directory is the
**source of truth** — files here are regenerated by running:

```bash
bash scripts/sync-spec.sh
```

## Why this exists

The app needs to read the canonical spec (schemas, agents, PRD templates)
to generate PRDs, plan agents, and validate documents. There are two
ways to do that:

1. **Bundle copies in TS** — what the legacy `file prd-templates-v2.ts` files
   do. This drifts from the spec every time someone edits a Foundation
   template.
2. **Bridge from Foundation** — what this directory does. Foundation is
   the single source of truth; the app imports from `src/data/spec/` at
   build time via the loader (`file loader.ts`).

## Layout

```markdown
src/data/spec/
├── 02-schemas/     # 10 JSON schemas (project, architecture, feature, etc.)
├── 03-agents/      # 17 agent prompt contracts (00-orchestrator → 16-landing-page-builder)
└── 04-templates/   # PRD Suite templates (v1, v1.5, v2)
    ├── v1/         # legacy
    ├── v1.5/       # operational
    └── v2/         # current, with RLM
```

## When to sync

- After editing any file under `AppArchitect-Foundation/02 - schemas/`,
  `03 - agents/`, or `04 - templates/`.
- Before generating any PRDs or running agents (the loader resolves
  these at build time).
- After pulling new spec content from the upstream foundation.

## Custom Foundation path

```bash
FOUNDATION_DIR=/path/to/AppArchitect-Foundation bash scripts/sync-spec.sh
```

## Do NOT edit files in here directly

If a file in `src/data/spec/` needs to change, edit the matching file in
`AppArchitect-Foundation/` and re-run the sync. Files here are
auto-generated.
